name: Gingered Carrots (Marks)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut carrots into matchstick slices or thin rounds.
2. Place the sliced carrots in a saucepan with broth and onion powder.
3. Cook for 15 minutes or until tender.
4. Drain excess liquid, then add lemon juice, ground ginger, chopped parsley, and whipped butter.
5. Toss lightly to combine all ingredients.
